industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Zhejiang Zheneng Electric Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Zheneng Electric Power Co., Ltd. engages in thermal power generation business in China. It also provides thermal products, as well as invests and manages gas power and nuclear power projects. The company is based in Hangzhou, China. Zhejiang Zheneng Electric Power Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Zhejiang Provincial Energy Group Company Ltd.
